summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShowSpot (BookMyShow clone) - backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with authentication integration issues

ui_bugs.issue: Registration and login forms not properly submitting to backend APIs
Chatbot toggle button has overlay interception preventing clicks

integration_issues.issue: Frontend auth forms not connecting to backend /api/auth/register and /api/auth/login endpoints

passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints working (movies, events, shows, auth, bookings, chat)
Home page loads with hero section and movie/event grids
Movie detail pages and show time display
Seat selection page with interactive grid
Seat selection functionality (A1, A2 selected, total Rs. 1000)
Authentication page with Sign In/Sign Up tabs
Database seeding (8 movies, 5 theatres, 480 shows, 4 events)

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality works, auth integration needs fixing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication integration - registration and login forms are not properly connecting to backend APIs. The forms render correctly but submissions don't reach /api/auth/register and /api/auth/login endpoints. Also fix chatbot overlay interception issue.
